meaning: n.耳语,私语,密谈,谣传,飒飒的声音vi.耳语,密谈,飒飒地响vt.低声说
examples: She spoke in a husky whisper.
She spoke in a fierce whisper.
Her voice dropped to a whisper.
This narrative, at times only a whisper or suggestion, weaves throughout my bodies of work.
Viana was saying something, not in a whisper now, but as if muttering to himself.
